title: palicourea orthoneura
intro: Palicourea orthoneura is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the "yellow root" due to its bright yellow color and root system. The medicinal properties of Palicourea orthoneura lie in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Palicourea orthoneura can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often mixed with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
